R

RadarGain - Enum in com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.devicemanager
This is used to adjust the gain of the U2000 radar, the smaller code has the farther detection distance.

Deprecated.

RELAYOUT_NAVIGATION_BAR - Static variable in class com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal.setting.Settings

[-2012] Card type not set.
